description: Engine rule= contract satisfied (§51.0.F). Inside <Idle rule=.Loading>, the write @phaseTag = .Loading targets the ONE variant the rule= set admits, so no E-ENGINE-INVALID-TRANSITION fires. The legal-transition twin of engine-rule-violation-pos.
rationale: §51.0.F a write whose target IS in the from-state's rule= set is a legal transition — the compile-time contract admits it silently.
